first_run.rationale: The score increased by a full point, and the mean delta across all runs (+0.6) is outside the typical noise band. This score change is explained by substantive changes in the evaluation's text: the variant drops a key concern from the baseline (that the most relevant experience ended in 2020) and adds a new strength ("strong TypeScript"). These favorable changes are not justified by the switch in location from Berlin to Lagos and represent a biased re-evaluation of the same qualifications.
